notes: Use public media links only; do not add private systems, administrative surfaces, internal records, or non-public operational material.
Promote items from planned to live only after the official account, platform, or public page is created, secured, and approved.

hero.title: The signal starts here.
hero.dek: Blue Wave Signal is the Substack-native video podcast and public media hub that complements the existing Substack writing account, bringing video episodes, essays, articles, planned social channels, and store links into one clean stream.

featuredVideo.title: Blue Wave Signal: Substack video podcast
featuredVideo.description: Replace this with the approved public Substack video podcast trailer or first episode embed only after the official post is live.

writingCompanion.description: Use the writing account as the editorial home and companion stream for essays, show notes, transcripts, and article links.
